commands:
switch %actor.level%
  case 1
  case 2
  case 3
  break
  case 4
    dg_cast 'magic missile' %actor%
  break
  case 5
    dg_cast 'chill touch' %actor%
  break
  case 6
    dg_cast 'burning hands' %actor%
  break
  case 7
  case 8
    dg_cast 'shocking grasp' %actor%
  break
  case 9
  case 10
  case 11
    dg_cast 'lightning bolt' %actor%
  break
  case 12
    dg_cast 'color spray' %actor%
  break
  case 13
    dg_cast 'energy drain' %actor%
  break
  case 14
    dg_cast 'curse' %actor%
  break
  case 15
    dg_cast 'poison' %actor%
  break
  case 16
    if %actor.align% > 0
      dg_cast 'dispel good' %actor%
    else
      dg_cast 'dispel evil' %actor%
    end
 break
  case 17
  case 18
    dg_cast 'call lightning' %actor%
  break
  case 19
  case 20
  case 21
  case 22
    dg_cast 'harm' %actor%
  break
  default
    dg_cast 'fireball' %actor%
  break
done
name: Magic User - 6502, 09, 16

commands:
if !%self.fighting%
  set actor %random.char%
  if %actor%
    if %actor.is_killer%
      emote screams 'HEY!!!  You're one of those PLAYER KILLERS!!!!!!'
      kill %actor.name%
    elseif %actor.is_thief%
      emote screams 'HEY!!!  You're one of those PLAYER THIEVES!!!!!!'
      kill %actor.name%
    elseif %actor.cha% < 6
      %send% %actor% %self.name% spits in your face.
      %echoaround% %actor% %self.name% spits in %actor.name%'s face.
    end
    if %actor.fighting%
      eval victim %actor.fighting%
      if %actor.align% < %victim.align% && %victim.align% >= 0
        emote screams 'PROTECT THE INNOCENT!  BANZAI!  CHARGE!  ARARARAGGGHH!'
        kill %actor.name%
      end
    end
  end
end
name: Cityguard - 6500
